summary: M5-EXIT-HUMAN-GATE-001 is CLOSED after PR #127 passed required CI, merged into origin/main at b09675c115b81ee05b7894071afb6f10000af011, and local main synchronized. M5_GATE = PASS_WITH_LIMITS. Current milestone advances to M6 and M6-TASK-GRAPH-001 is READY.

decisions: Close M5-EXIT-HUMAN-GATE-001 only after PR #127 entered main and local main matched origin/main.
